name: Facebook Pixel
description: Tracks user behavior and sends data to Meta servers. No BAA available.

name: TikTok Pixel
description: Tracks conversions and sends data to TikTok servers. No BAA available.

name: Google Analytics (Universal)
description: Legacy analytics that transmits user data to Google. No BAA available for UA.

name: Google Analytics 4
description: Transmits user data to Google. Google does NOT offer a BAA for Google Analytics (any version). Using GA4 on pages that handle PHI is a known HIPAA violation vector per HHS OCR guidance (2022, reaffirmed 2024).

name: Google Tag Manager
description: Tag management system that can load any third-party script. High risk due to dynamic script loading.

name: Hotjar
description: Session recording and heatmap tool. Records user interactions including form inputs.

name: FullStory
description: Session replay tool that captures detailed user interactions.

name: Microsoft Clarity
description: Session recording and heatmap tool. Captures user behavior data.

name: LinkedIn Insight Tag
description: Tracks conversions and retargeting. Sends data to LinkedIn.

name: Twitter/X Pixel
description: Conversion tracking pixel. Sends data to X/Twitter servers.

name: HubSpot Tracking
description: Marketing automation tracking. HubSpot offers BAA for Enterprise customers.

name: Intercom
description: Customer messaging platform. May collect PHI through chat. BAA available on specific plans.

name: Drift
description: Conversational marketing tool. Chat may collect PHI.

name: LiveChat
description: Live chat widget. Patients may share PHI in chat messages.

name: Zendesk
description: Customer support widget. Zendesk offers HIPAA-compliant plans with BAA.

name: Mouseflow
description: Session replay and analytics tool. Records user interactions.

name: Heap Analytics
description: Auto-capture analytics that records all user interactions.

name: Segment
description: Customer data platform. Can be configured for HIPAA compliance with BAA.

name: Reddit Pixel
description: Conversion tracking pixel. Transmits user data to Reddit. No BAA available.

name: Pinterest Tag
description: Conversion tracking for Pinterest ads. No BAA available.

name: Snapchat Pixel
description: Conversion tracking for Snapchat ads. No BAA available.

name: Microsoft Bing UET
description: Universal Event Tracking for Microsoft Ads. No BAA available for Bing Ads.

name: Google Ads / DoubleClick
description: Google advertising network including remarketing tags. No BAA available for advertising products.

name: Criteo
description: Retargeting and display advertising platform. No BAA available.

name: Outbrain / Taboola
description: Content recommendation networks that track users across sites. No BAA available.
